data.summary: Freelance Full-Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building custom web applications for startups and small businesses. Specialized in React, Node.js, and cloud deployment. Proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions on time and within budget.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Built complete online store with shopping cart, payment processing, and admin dashboard. Technologies: React, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Stripe API, AWS. Implemented inventory management, order tracking, and customer accounts. Delivered on-time, 20% under budget.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Developed analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization. Technologies: React, Python Flask, MongoDB, Chart.js, WebSockets. Features: User authentication, role-based access control, data export. Improved client's data analysis efficiency by 60%.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Designed and developed responsive web app for fitness tracking. Technologies: React Native (Web), Node.js, Firebase, Stripe. Features: User profiles, workout tracking, progress charts, subscription management. Launched with 1,000+ active users in first month.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Built custom CMS for content publishing and management. Technologies: Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS S3. Features: Rich text editor, media library, SEO optimization, analytics. Reduced content publishing time by 50%.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Developed RESTful API for data processing and integration. Technologies: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS Lambda. Integrated with third-party services (Salesforce, HubSpot, Stripe). Handled 1M+ API requests per month with 99.9% uptime.

experience.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Customized WordPress themes and developed custom plugins. Technologies: PHP, JavaScript, MySQL, WordPress APIs. Completed 15+ projects for small businesses and bloggers. Improved site performance and SEO for all clients.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
